content:
ontainer_status: c.status.clone(),
        created: c.created,
        health: extract_health(&c.status),
        repo_url: c.labels.get("corvia.repo_url").cloned(),
        cpu_percent: None,
        memory_bytes: None,
        memory_limit: None,
    }
}
struct DockerStats {
    #[serde(default)]
    cpu_stats: CpuStats,
    #[serde(default)]
    precpu_stats: CpuStats,
    #[serde(default)]
    memory_stats: MemoryStats,
}
